original: The ganrael is hidden among the stones and fungi at the moment, prowling for the best direction to strike from. Disturbing scuttling sounds echo in the chamber, and you’ve no doubt that you’ll get another look all too soon.

The ganrael’s meticulously-curated covering is in ruins, and its movement has slowed considerably. Underneath the shattered guise is a blank, flat-bodied neuter. It still attempts to circle you, but its trunk now resembles a chubby
The ganrael ambusher is a frightful sight. Tens of skittering, insectile legs shift and clatter beneath its lichen cloak
You manage to keep away from it.

Your [pc.foot] slips on its gooey trunk and you stumble, landing right on the alien’s body! It drags you to the ground, oozing warm tongues of flesh into your intimate places. Using all your focus, you
barely
resist its caresses and roll away. You’ve been tripped!
It connects, but your wings keep you upright anyway.
You easily hop over it.
It takes out your support and you crash to the cave floor! You’ve been tripped!
You keep sight of it with your honed aim and superior intelligence.
It’s hard to track, but damage has left colorful gaps in the lichen covering.
Its exposed "+this.skinTone+" and goopy sounds stick out well enough that you can keep tracking it.
Your drone continues to track it, making it easy to reacquire.
It takes advantage of your grounded state, moving through blind spots until you lose it completely. The cave echoes with its scuffling gait, like the earth is shifting in preparation to swallow you.
Despite your best efforts, you lose track of it. The cave echoes with skitters and laughs, no two from the same direction, and your anxiety mounts.
The ganrael sails at you and you throw it to the ground. It skitters away and, though its stoic mask doesn’t show it, seems a little surprised.
Your newfound tranquility makes it slightly less stressful when the ganrael tackles you from cover and wraps you up in its body, laughing.
goopy fingers
hard hands
grab your [pc.foot] and bring you violently to the ground! The ganrael wraps you in its body, pinning your wings.
crotch and licking at your [pc.legFurScales].
[pc.gear], hunting for sensitive spots.
Blood hammers in your temples and your needy
sexes throb
sex throbs
asshole throbs
inches away from its tendrils, demanding attention.
Your shield crackles dangerously.
It’s mildly uncomfortable until your amorphous body flows out of the way.
You panic as trapped blood dims your vision and numbs you. You’ve got to get free!
